scripts.validate: bun run lint:fix && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.validate:ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run generate:check
scripts.generate: TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR=$PWD/packages/client/src/bindings cargo test --features full -p yauth -- export_bindings --nocapture && cargo test --features full -p yauth -- generate_openapi_spec --exact --nocapture --include-ignored && bunx orval
scripts.generate:check: TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR=$PWD/packages/client/src/bindings cargo test --features full -p yauth -- export_bindings --nocapture && cargo test --features full -p yauth -- check_openapi_spec_up_to_date --exact --nocapture
